summary: Iteration 12 audit verification — code-hygiene + standards-alignment pass on /leadership and /history. All 11 review items pass with zero issues. The CRITICAL fix (Leadership bio card hrefs) is verified: all 6 leader cards now correctly route to /leadership/${slug}.

history_page.h2_text: See what twenty years of this approachproduces.

critical_code_review_comments: Iteration 12 is a tightly scoped hygiene pass and all four code changes are correctly implemented. The previously broken Leadership bio card hrefs were a silent UX regression — main agent's catch is solid.

Minor observation (not blocking, not in scope): the home SiteFooter v5 still uses raw <a href> tags for internal nav (Approach, Discovery Process, What We Build, etc.) instead of React Router <Link>. This causes full-page reloads on internal nav from the homepage footer. Not part of this iteration's scope but worth a future pass to align with the BriefFooter pattern.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration_12 verified all standards-alignment fixes for /leadership and /history. All 6 leader card hrefs now route to /leadership/${slug} (previously broken at /${slug}). Footer rename 'Expertise Areas' -> 'What We Build' applied successfully to both BriefFooter and Home SiteFooter v5. History final CTA now matches canonical pattern (button + eyebrow + wipe-d1/wipe-d2 delays). Layout parity verified — both pages have hero ≥780px and main paddingTop=112px. Note: Home v5 SiteFooter still uses raw <a> tags (full reload on internal nav) — flagged as out-of-scope future improvement.
